body:
## Summary

Both confirmed MISSING from `albumArticles.js` (239 slugs). Converge arc in DB: Jane Doe (2001, ✅) + Axe to Fall (2009, ✅) — these two fill the decade forward. **Ben Koller has 8 GA4 page views this week** (top 4 organic page, /drummer/ben-koller) — highest non-Joey Jordison signal per-drummer page.

**Albums:**
- **All We Love We Leave Behind** (2012) — Converge's most melodically accessible album. AP Magazine Album of the Year. Strong crossover appeal (hardcore/metal boundary). Slug: `all-we-love-we-leave-behind-drum-setup`
- **The Dusk in Us** (2017) — UK chart entry. "I Can Tell You About Pain" = notable single. Slug: `the-dusk-in-us-drum-setup`

## DB Verification
```bash
node -e "const {ALBUM_ARTICLES} = await import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js'); console.log(Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES).filter(s => s.includes('all-we-love') || s.includes('dusk-in-us')));"
```
Expected: empty array.

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 2 entries
- `/public/llms/articles/all-we-love-we-leave-behind-drum-setup.md`
- `/public/llms/articles/the-dusk-in-us-drum-setup.md`

## Drummer
Ben Koller — profile at /drummer/ben-koller (8 GA4 views this week). Converge-affiliated. Hardline natural drumming style: no triggers, raw sound.

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A ("What drum kit does Ben Koller use?", "What snare does Ben Koller play?", "What is Ben Koller's setup on All We Love We Leave Behind?")
- FAQPage + Person schema
- Internal links ≥3: /drummer/ben-koller, /articles/jane-doe-drum-setup, /articles/axe-to-fall-drum-setup

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets: "ben koller drum kit", "converge drummer gear", "ben koller drum setup" — 8 GA4 views confirms active search demand. Completing the Converge arc (Jane Doe → Axe to Fall → All We Love → Dusk in Us) deepens cluster coherence for LLM entity recall.

## Verify
- [ ] Both slugs return 200 with gear content
- [ ] LLM files at /llms/articles/ return 200
- [ ] Internal links to /drummer/ben-koller + ≥2 other Converge articles
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates
- [ ] Ben Koller kit specs cited (Tama/Meinl era noted)

## Done
Both articles live, LLM files present, sitemap auto-updated via ALBUM_ARTICLES dynamic import.
title: SEO batch: Converge 'All We Love We Leave Behind' (2012) + 'The Dusk in Us' (2017) drum setup articles (Ben Koller — extends Converge arc post-Axe to Fall, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
